title: rosa acicularis var. carelica
intro: Rosa acicularis var. carelica, also known as the Carelica Rose, is a specific variety of the prickly rose plant, characterized by its sharp thorns and fragrant pink flowers. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Rosa acicularis var. carelica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be made to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
